data.name: 地獄的八號街·少女偵探美織的怪異筆記本
data.detailed_description:
紫法院美織是一名專門調查異常現象的女性偵探。某日，她收到了一宗失蹤人口的委託案件。據說，那人是在名為「幻影第八街」的詭異場所中失去蹤影。

當美織親自抵達現場，她發現那是一個會將擁有靈力者困在無限輪迴中的詛咒之地。

想要打破這個輪迴、踏上真正的第八街，她只能不斷向前。

她究竟會花上多久，才能從幻影第八街逃脫？

又是否能在過程中守住自己的意志，不被徹底摧毀？

你將扮演紫法院美織，一位受困於詛咒街道中的偵探。

前進的關鍵，在於運用你的觀察力辨識異常現象。若出現異常，就穿越天橋；若一切正常，則繼續直行。

但只要一次判斷失誤，美織就會被打回起點。想要逃出生天，必須連續做出正確的選擇。

遊戲中的異常現象有的明顯、有的隱晦，將全方位考驗你的細節掌握力。

放鬆警惕，你將為每一個錯誤付出代價！

快速反應事件（QTE）

遊戲中收錄了搭配精緻動畫的趣味QTE小遊戲！

每當你發現異常時，需透過QTE將其驅散（若你不喜歡這種玩法，也可自由調整或關閉）。

但要注意！每次失敗，美織的行動都會變得更加受限，彷彿被無形的詛咒逐步束縛住……

自動儲存

遊戲會自動記錄你的進度，就算不小心離開，也無須擔心忘記儲存。

時間挑戰模式

挑戰自己能多快完成「淨化模式」！你能在時間結束前發現所有異常嗎

data.short_description: 在這款冒險遊戲中，你將化身為年輕偵探美織，踏上尋找失蹤者的旅程，並淨化詭異又不安的「幻影第八街」。透過充滿挑戰的快速反應事件考驗你的手眼協調。只有反應夠快才能前進，猶豫一秒，就可能招來懲罰。
data.supported_languages:
英文, 日文*, 簡體中文, 繁體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: Hell's 8th Avenue: Miori's Mysterious Notebook
data.detailed_description:
Miori Shihoin, a female detective specializing in investigating anomalies, received a missing persons request one day. Apparently, the individual had disappeared in what is known as 'Illusory 8th Street.'

When Miori arrives at the entrance herself, she discovers that it is a cursed place that traps those with spiritual powers in an endless loop. To break the loop, she must reach 8th Street by pushing forward.

How long will it take her to escape Illusory 8th Street? Can she make it out without being broken herself?

You play as Miori Shihoin, a detective stuck navigating the cursed streets. To progress, use your observational skills to detect anomalies - if one is present, pass under the overpass; if not, continue forward. Each mistake sends Miori back to the start. To escape, you must make all the right choices in a row.

This game tests your attention to detail with anomalies ranging from the obvious to the obscure. Stay vigilant, or expect to get punished for your mistakes!

Quick Time Events

A fun QTE minigame with beautifully animated scenes is in this game! Dispel each anomaly you find with a QTE (which can be adjusted or turned off if you don't feel like they are your style). With each QTE failure, Miori becomes more and more restrained.

Time Attack

Challenge yourself to see how fast you can complete "Purification Mode"! Can you find all the anomalies before time runs out?

Auto-Save

The game will save your current progress automatically, so you don’t have to worry if you accidentally quit without saving.

data.short_description: In this adventure game, play as Miori, a young detective tasked with finding a missing person and purifying the ominous 'Illusory 8th Street.' Challenge your dexterity with fun Quick Time Events and push forward... or get punished for being too slow.
data.supported_languages:
English, Japanese*, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • Processor: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
